{"type":"flowgraph","mermaid":"graph LR server["API Server
Orator + Meadow + SQLite"] web["Web Client
Pict Application"] console["Console Client
blessed TUI"] cli["CLI Client
pict-service-commandlineutility"] web -- "fetch()" --> server console -- "http.request()" --> server cli -- "http.request()" --> server style server fill:#e3f2fd,stroke:#42a5f5,color:#333 style web fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#43a047,color:#333 style console fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ffa726,color:#333 style cli fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#ab47bc,color:#333 ","style":"notebook"}
